compressed_prompt: Write two limericks for moms about how hard it is to get their kids to do chores. Be angry about it. Separate your two limericks with six asterisks (******).
response:
Here are two angry limericks for frustrated moms:

"Clean your room!" I have screamed every day,
But the dishes just sit in the way.
They stare at their phones,
While I grumble and groan,
And the laundry continues to stay!

******

I asked you to vacuum the floor,
You just rolled your eyes, what a bore!
I'm losing my mind,
You've got so much time,
I swear I can't take anymore!
